name: No-Cook Light Bananaberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 box CERTO light fruit pectin crystals
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the fruits into a large bowl.
2. Measure the sugar and set aside.
3. Combine the CERTO fruit pectin crystals with 1/4 cup of the measured sugar in a small bowl.
4. Gradually add the pectin mixture to the fruit, stirring well.
5. Let stand for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Gradually stir in the remaining sugar and continue stirring for 3 minutes until most of the sugar is dissolved.
7. Pour into clean jars or plastic containers.
8. Cover tightly with lids.
9. Let stand at room temperature until set (may take up to 24 hours).
10. Store in freezer or up to 3 weeks in fridge.
